raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Department of Insurance (CDI) is required to review the Safer from Wildfires regulations every five years.",
    "The legislation aims to potentially include additional building hardening measures and community-level wildfire mitigation programs.",
    "The current state of the insurance market is leaving thousands of families without coverage.",
    "Insurance rates are rising even in areas that are considered low risk for wildfires and natural disasters.",
    "The Safer from Wildfires program is the only avenue available for consumers to receive direct insurance discounts for hardening their homes and neighborhoods.",
    "There is currently no requirement for the CDI to evaluate the regulations for the Safer from Wildfires program.",
    "New and safer building materials are coming to market, necessitating a periodic revisit of wildfire regulations."
  ]
}
```
